creator: ohm@nanatsumori.net
text:
The GCRY_SECMEM_FLAG_NO_WARNING and GCRY_SECMEM_FLAG_SUSPEND_WARNING macro defined in secmem.h has been fixed in libgcrypt CVS tree(rev 1014), but not in 1.2 release yet.  As a result, the option --no-secmem-warning of gnupg 2 does not work (if not suid root) and cause programs that use gnupg to produce garbled encrypted file.

Fix: 

tentatively introduce the fix as patch.
